messages.content: The Angry Earth begin to consume Old First Light in wild overgrowth to create Elysian Wilds - rephrase this please
Old First Light is being engulfed by the Angry Earth, as it transforms into the lush and thriving Elysian Wilds.
The Angry Earth begin to consume Old First Light in wild overgrowth to create Elysian Wilds. - rephrase this please
The furious forces of nature unleash their wrath upon Old First Light, engulfing it in untamed vegetation and giving rise to the magnificent Elysian Wilds.
The Angry Earth begin to consume Old First Light in wild overgrowth to create Elysian Wilds. - rephrase this please
The raging forces of the Earth greedily devour Old First Light as it succumbs to a rampant spread of exuberant foliage, eventually transforming into the captivating Elysian Wilds.
Two Adventurers ride mounts as they approach New Olympus in Elysian Wilds. - rephrase this please
As they draw near to New Olympus within the enchanting expanse of the Elysian Wilds, two brave adventurers traverse the terrain astride their mighty mounts.
We can’t wait for players to experience every new feature, including the story behind the fall of First Light, in our first paid expansion. - rephrase this please

Anticipating with great excitement, we eagerly look forward to players immersing themselves in our inaugural paid expansion, where they will have the opportunity to discover and delve into a multitude of fresh features, including the captivating narrative that unravels the intriguing tale of First Light's downfall.
Here’s an overview of every major update coming to New World as part of Rise of the Angry Earth, plus answers to your most common questions such as new system requirements. - rephrase this please

Providing a comprehensive preview of all the significant updates on the horizon for New World as part of the Rise of the Angry Earth, this overview also offers valuable answers to commonly asked questions, including details about the new system requirements.
You will need to purchase Rise of the Angry Earth to experience the following updates: New Story - rephrase this please
To fully immerse yourself in the following updates, including a captivating new story, the purchase of Rise of the Angry Earth expansion will be required.
For Resilience, we’ve added crit reduction to all players via the equip load effects (Light -15%, Medium -20%, Heavy -25%). - rephrase this please

In order to enhance player resilience, we have implemented critical reduction through equip load effects for all players, with light armor providing a reduction of 15%, medium armor reducing it by 20%, and heavy armor granting a substantial reduction of 25%.
New World has continued to grow since launch and reached a point where the PC requirements for running the game need to scale with these new experiences. - rephrase this please
Since its launch, New World has witnessed significant growth and has now reached a stage where the PC requirements for running the game must adapt and align with these expanded experiences.
